scripts.build:pages: BASE_PATH=/Binisoft-marketplace/ VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://us-central1-jon-sport.cloudfunctions.net/publicApi npm run build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html
scripts.deploy:firebase: npm run build && rm -rf "../Business Dashboard API/hosting-shop" && cp -R dist "../Business Dashboard API/hosting-shop" && cd "../Business Dashboard API" && firebase deploy --only hosting:shop
